name: Saviynt
description: Identity governance and administration (IGA) platform. Monitor employee access, role-based access controls, and access review campaigns.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to your Saviynt EIC instance as an admin
2. Create or identify a service account with API access
3. Navigate to Admin > Settings > Webservice Auth Configuration
4. Ensure the service account has read permissions for Users, Roles, and Campaigns APIs
5. Enter your instance URL (e.g. https://yourcompany.saviyntcloud.com), username, and password below

credentialFields.label: Instance URL
credentialFields.helpText: Your Saviynt instance URL, e.g. https://yourcompany.saviyntcloud.com (no trailing slash)

credentialFields.label: Service Account Username
credentialFields.helpText: API service account username with webservice access permissions.

credentialFields.label: Service Account Password
credentialFields.helpText: Password for the API service account.

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Verifies that employee user accounts can be retrieved from Saviynt, confirming identity directory access.

checks.name: Role-based Access Controls
checks.description: Verifies that roles are configured in Saviynt for role-based access governance.

checks.name: Access Review Log
checks.description: Verifies that access review campaigns exist in Saviynt, confirming periodic access certifications are performed.
